query:
SELECT 
  'Empty/NULL descriptions' as issue_type,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM island_guides 
WHERE description IS NULL OR description = '' OR TRIM(description) = ''
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Empty/NULL slug',
  COUNT(*)
FROM island_guides 
WHERE slug IS NULL OR slug = ''
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Empty/NULL atoll',
  COUNT(*)
FROM island_guides 
WHERE atoll IS NULL OR atoll = ''
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Duplicate island names',
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT name)
FROM island_guides
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Empty Things to Do',
  COUNT(*)
FROM island_guides 
WHERE topThingsToDo IS NULL OR topThingsToDo = '' OR topThingsToDo = '[]'
